Game.Name: Soukou Kihei Votoms - The Battling Road (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Soukou Kihei Votoms: The Battling Road is a mecha game featuring simulation style shooting gameplay. It is based on the Armored Trooper Votoms anime, and is the fourth game adaptation of the franchise (though the first for the Super Famicom) and features multiple characters and ATs (Armored Troopers) from the anime. The game uses the Super Famicom's Mode 7 to present a 3D environment that the player's mech walks around in while taking down enemies by using the radar.Cheat: Robot SlideshowAfter the credits are over, wait 2 minutes at the "Produced by Takara" screen without touching any buttons to see a slideshow of all the robots.
Game.Notes: A mecha game featuring simulation style shooting gameplay. It is based on the Armored Trooper Votoms anime, and is the fourth game adaptation of the franchise (though the first for the Super Famicom) and features multiple characters and ATs (Armored Troopers) from the anime.The game uses the Super Famicom's Mode 7 to present a 3D environment that the player's mech walks around in while taking down enemies by using the radar.
